hero.heroTitle: The magazine for trucking in northern Sweden
hero.heroDescription: Reach over 2400 trucking companies in northern Sweden with Norrkatalogen Åkeri.

info.subTitle: Why Advertise with Norrkatalogen?
info.subDescription: Norrkataologen is the leading magazine for the trucking industry in northern Sweden, reaching over 3600 companies. With our targeted distribution and high-quality content, we provide an unparalleled platform for businesses to connect with their audience and grow their brand in this niche market.
info.title: Your partner for reaching the trucking industry in northern Sweden.
info.description: Norrkatalogen Åkeri is published eight times a year in February, March, May, June, August, September, October and December. The magazine is distributed free of charge to all trucking companies in northern Sweden, making it an indispensable resource for both advertisers and readers in the industry.
info.description2: Local reports that highlight the everyday life, challenges and successes of trucking companies across northern Sweden. Through close and authentic stories, readers gain insight into the realities of the industry, from the roads and companies to the people behind the wheel.

adSection.title: Why Advertise with Norrkatalogen Åkeri?
adSection.quote: With an ad in Norrkatalogen Åkeri, you reach an interested, quality-conscious and investment-strong target audience. Being a trucker in northern Sweden requires a little extra from both the vehicle fleet and the person behind the wheel.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.contactFormDescription: Have questions about advertising with Norrkatalogen? Send us a message and we'll get back to you.
contact.magazineDescription: Register for our magazine and get the latest issues delivered directly to your mailbox.
